A.text: splits and flows over the roof and under the car

C.text: only moves straight up into the sky

parsed.answer_value: splits and flows over the roof and under the car
parsed.rationale: The visualization shows the airflow around the car, with the air reaching the front and then splitting. The flow over the roof and under the car is indicated by the color gradients and patterns in the visualization.
